audits.value: 1: Footway present (anywhere in view; regardless of width, condition, or whether things are on it)
0: No footway — pedestrians would use the road surface or an undelineated shoulder
0: No usable clear path — obstructions force pedestrians into the road
0: Good — smooth, intact, no trip hazards
0: No parking on the pedestrian zone
0: No — pedestrians on footway, or none visible in the road
0: No usable clear path — obstructions force pedestrians into the road
